top_signals.title: Nvidia Faces High Expectations as It Reports Earnings
top_signals.summary: Nvidia during the Computex conference in Taipei. Photographer: Annabelle Chih/Bloomberg
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: NextEra to Buy Dominion for $67B to Form Power Giant
top_signals.summary: Bloomberg's David Carnevali joins Dani Burger on "Bloomberg Deals." NextEra Energy agreed to pay about $67 billion in stock for Dominion Energy in the biggest power acquisition ever, creating a giant utility extending from Florida to the artificial intelligence data centers clustered in Virginia. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Agnico doubles Wallbridge Mining stake to over 19%
top_signals.summary: The investment is part of a C$56 million private placement of Wallbridge shares.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Core Lithium restarts Finniss mine on price rebound
top_signals.summary: Recovering spodumene prices are prompting Australian lithium producers to revive suspended mines and expansion plans.
